section.heading: Funds for contaminant sample analyses

content.p: In fiscal year 2012 and hereafter, of the amount provided for environmental contaminants, up to $1,000,000 may remain available until expended for contaminant sample analyses.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 112–74, div. E, title I, Dec. 23, 2011, 125 Stat. 988.)
